message:
fix(signal+shutdown): signal notify race and shutdown phase_changed→wait_for_phase

signal.rs:
  Capture the Notified future BEFORE reading the delivery counter.
  Previously, the notify could fire between the counter check and
  the notified().await call, causing the signal to be missed until
  the next delivery. Classic check-then-wait TOCTOU pattern.

shutdown.rs:
  Replace phase_changed() (returns after any phase transition) with
  wait_for_phase(target) (loops until phase >= target). The new
  method captures the Notified future before checking the phase,
  preventing the same TOCTOU race. Callers no longer need to
  manually loop checking phases.

listener.rs, server.rs:
  Update callers from phase_changed() to wait_for_phase() with
  the specific target phase they're waiting for.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
